notes: Rebaselined after fixing the longitudinal_g/lateral_g cross-step EMA bug. Previously prev_forward_speed was compared against the caller-returned linvel (a round-trip in production with Rapier between steps), so delta collapsed to ~0 and the EMA filtered nothing meaningful. Replaced with the in-step delta (clamped_forward - forward_speed) which is the actual force-induced acceleration the chassis felt this step. Side-effect: lat_g at 80m/50ms dropped 8.15 -> 3.06 G — the new value matches the v^2/r kinematic floor of 3.19 G (the test geometry literally demands ≥3.19 G to sustain the circle). Other scenarios within FP noise of prior values. See tests/realism_anchors_2026.rs for the 2026 anchor suite. Earlier history: lowered LAP_DEPLOY_TARGET_MJ 7.0 → 5.0 MJ (taper limit 8.75 → 6.25 MJ); SemiAuto mid-range deploy multipliers raised; coast cap 100 → 160 kW; critical floor 10% → 7%; brakes::heat_to_tires divides by 130 °C span; Stefan-Boltzmann uses 2× disc area; tire/engine cooling floor at ambient; brake-to-tire heat biased 70/30 inner/outer.
